Initial scaffold: workspace with core, shm, mkt_run, client crates

commit.message:
fix/pdf upload 413 — reduce max file size to 3MB

Vercel serverless has a hard 4.5MB request body limit. Base64
encoding adds ~33% overhead, so 3MB raw → ~4MB encoded stays
safely under the limit. Also adds user-facing alert when a file
exceeds the size limit instead of silently skipping.

fix: rewrite hint to use cancelQuiz + animateCharacter + quizStartStrokeNum

showHint() only flashed briefly without keeping strokes visible.

- Track hintedStrokes count with ref
- On hint: cancel quiz → animate full character (user sees stroke order)
- After animation resolves: restart quiz with quizStartStrokeNum=N
  so pre-hinted strokes appear drawn, user only draws remaining strokes

- Score calculation based on strokes user actually drew (total - hinted)

commit.message:
mitigate duplicate-process journal overwrite

Three layers of defense against a second run.sh instance overwriting
journals that have already been archived to Arweave:

1. run.sh: replace racy PID-file check with atomic mkdir lock.
   mkdir succeeds exactly once under concurrent starts — second instance
   exits immediately rather than silently racing.

2. archive.js: chmod 444 on journal after successful Arweave upload.
   Any subsequent write attempt by a stale agent gets EACCES, preventing
   silent overwrite of permanently archived content.

3. archive.js: mtime drift auto-repair. If a journal's mtime exceeds
   indexed_at by >30s, the file was modified post-upload — archive re-parses,
   updates SQLite text_content, and re-uploads to Arweave automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 'Cannot convert 0x to a BigInt' crash on stake page

RPC calls can return '0x' (empty hex) instead of '0x0'. The || '0x0'
fallback didn't catch this since '0x' is truthy. Added safeBigInt()
helper with try/catch and replaced all raw BigInt() calls on RPC
results.

commit.message:
fix: move SAF scanning to IO dispatcher + add loading/refreshing UI

scanComponents and getRootDocument do blocking disk IO but were called
on Dispatchers.Main (the default for viewModelScope.launch), causing
the main thread to hang on initial load (black screen) and ANR dialog
on refresh.

Wrapped both calls in withContext(Dispatchers.IO) so the main thread
stays responsive and the loading indicator can actually render.

Also replaced the bare CircularProgressIndicator with a card that shows
"Loading components..." on first load and "Refreshing components..." on
subsequent refreshes.

Files touched:
- app/src/main/java/com/banner/inject/viewmodel/MainViewModel.kt
- app/src/main/java/com/banner/inject/ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add real-time unread message badge + fix Mütter finden link

- Polls /api/messages/unread every 15s, plays notification sound on new messages
- Fix search page ignoring ?mode=moms query param from dashboard buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rewrite server.py as self-contained — direct Groq API, no local imports

All previous failures were caused by importing local agent/tool/simulator
modules which had unresolvable path issues in Railway's container.

New approach — everything in one file, zero local module imports:
- _call_groq(): calls Groq API directly via urllib (stdlib only, no langchain)
- _parse_intent(): Groq LLM parses natural language → structured intent JSON
- _generate_config(): Groq LLM generates 3GPP Release 18 network config
- _monitor_network(): reads real rows from 6G HetNet CSV dataset
- _optimize_network(): reads next dataset row as before/after metrics
- _fallback_pipeline(): keyword-only fallback if Groq is unavailable

Dependencies: flask, pandas (both always available). No agents/, tools/,
simulator/, or config/ imports anywhere.

commit.message:
Fix TDZ: move _uboIdx/_UBO_COL/_UBO_LBL before init() call

let/const declarations at line ~3509 were after init() at line 2735.
When init() → _restoreFromHash() → openDeep() → renderDeep() ran during
page load, accessing _uboIdx hit the Temporal Dead Zone (TDZ) and threw
ReferenceError: Cannot access '_uboIdx' before initialization.

Fix: move _uboIdx, _UBO_COL, _UBO_LBL declarations to just before init().
Also fix the renderDeep guard from window._uboIdx (always undefined for
let vars) to just _uboIdx, which now works since it's pre-declared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
